title: Herobrine Data Pack
description: Adds Herobrine into your Minecraft world.
body:
### Add **Herobrine** to your world in a way that stays true to the legend:

Rare appearances, unsettling moments, and the occasional heart drop when you notice him. The pack is non-griefing and focused entirely on ambience and suspense. It also works nicely in multiplayer: drop it onto a server and everyone can encounter Herobrine without having to download anything separately.

**Content:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This data pack adds Herobrine into the game. Herobrine will rarely appear around a player, just staring at them. If he is seen, he will vanish in a puff of smoke. He will NOT grief your world in any way, just stalk you and give your world a spooky vibe.

- Herobrine must be summoned by sacrificing a crying obsidian on his shrine
- Herobrine will rarely appear around a player 
- If looked at, he will play a spooky noise and disappear in a puff of smoke
- Herobrine has a chance to jumpscare the player if looked at
- Herobrine can be banished by sacrificing a diamond on his shrine
- For more information, check out the video below!

</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kVWBEm6riaQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
